title: General Aptitude - Verbal Aptitude - English Grammar

questions.question:
Choose the most appropriate word from the options given below to complete the following sentence: He is _____________ speaker, his discourses are always informative and inspirational.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A

“The judge’s standing in the legal community, though shaken by false allegations of wrongdoing, remained ________________ .” The word that best fills the blank in the above sentence is :



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A

The untimely loss of life is a cause of serious global concern as thousands of people get killed _______________ accidents every year while many other die ______________ diseases like cardio vascular disease, cancer, etc.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A

Given below question has an idiomatic expression followed by four options. Choose the one closest to its meaning :

\( \text{“To smell a rat”} \)



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A

He was not only accused of theft ____________ of conspiracy.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B

“The dress ___________ him so well that she immediately _____________ him on his appearance.” The words that best fill the blanks in the above sentence are \( : \)



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B

Each of these questions \( (37-38) \) has an idiomatic expression followed by four options. Choose the one closest to its meaning.

Talk shop \( : \)



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B

Each of these questions \( (37-38) \) has an idiomatic expression followed by four options. Choose the one closest to its meaning.

Identify the correct spelling out of the given options \( : \)



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B

“Going by the ____________ that many hands make light work, the school ____________ involved all the students in the task.” The words that best fill the blanks in the above sentence are \( : \)



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B

The fisherman, ___________ the flood victims owed their lives, were rewarded by the govt.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B

According to Wikipedia, 'monologue' is presented by a single character most often to express their mental thoughts aloud, though sometimes also to directly address another character or the audience. Which of the following does NOT represent a monologue?



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section A | Question: 30
options: A poet reciting a poem on the stage
A mother narrating a story to her child
A teacher taking up student queries in the class
questions.correct_answer: A teacher taking up student queries in the class

questions.question:
Direction (41-43): Out of the four sentences given below three are incorrect and one correct. The correct one is your answer.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section B | Question: 42
options: He, you, and I will leave for this secret mission tonight.
You, he, and I will leave for this secret mission tonight.
I, you, and he will leave for this secret mission tonight.
You, I and he will leave for this secret mission tonight.
questions.correct_answer: You, he, and I will leave for this secret mission tonight.

questions.question:

The only people interested in this book are seeming to be lawyers.
The only people interested in the book are seemingly to be lawyers.
The only people interested in the books seem to be lawyers.
questions.correct_answer: The only people interested in the books seem to be lawyers.

Direction \( (47-49) \): Read the following comprehension carefully and answer the following questions.
Humans are to be blamed for declining bat populations. Bats get poisoned when they consume insects that have been sprayed with pesticides and insecticides. But the biggest problem for bats is the loss of natural habitat. Many bats prefer to roost in dead or dying trees under the loose and peeling bark, or in tree cavities. Some prefer to roost in caverns. Populations have dwindled and diversity has suffered without the protection of these important natural roosts.

Find a word in the passage which means the same as decline.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section B | Question: 47

Direction \( (47-49) \): Read the following comprehension carefully and answer the following questions.
Humans are to be blamed for declining bat populations. Bats get poisoned when they consume insects that have been sprayed with pesticides and insecticides. But the biggest problem for bats is the loss of natural habitat. Many bats prefer to roost in dead or dying trees under the loose and peeling bark, or in tree cavities. Some prefer to roost in caverns. Populations have dwindled and diversity has suffered without the protection of these important natural roosts.

Find a word in the paragraph which means the opposite of coating.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section B | Question: 49

Direction (53-55): Choose the word that is opposite in meaning to the given word.

that blurs in social terms any sharp distinction between city and village or big city and small city.

questions.question:
Directions: In questions (35 - 36), the sentences have been given in Direct / Indirect speech. From the given alternatives, choose the one which best expresses the given sentence in direct or indirect speech as directed:

Change the following sentence into direct speech :

The moderator told him to sit down and to let others speak.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist D | Section B | Question: 36
options: The moderator said, "Sit down and let others speak."
The moderator asked him to sit down and let others speak.
The moderator commanded him, "to sit down and to let others speak."
The moderator commanded him to sit down and to "Let others speak".
questions.correct_answer: The moderator said, "Sit down and let others speak."

questions.question:
Directions: In the questions ( 37 - 38), the given sentences are in Active / Passive voice. From the given alternatives, choose the one which best expresses the given sentence in active or passive voice as directed :

A new book has been published against the hunting of endangered species.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist D | Section B | Question: 37
options: A new book has been published against endangered species being hunted.
Hunting of endangered species is against the new book that has been published.
Hunting of endangered species was against the new book that has been published.
A new book has been published against endangered species to be hunted.
questions.correct_answer: A new book has been published against endangered species being hunted.

Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist D | Section B | Question: 51

Choose the most appropriate sentence from the options given below to express the given below sentence in plural.

It is useful for a library to be located away from a noisy building to enable a student to concentrate.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist D | Section B | Question: 52
options: It is useful for libraries to be located away from noisy buildings to enable students to concentrate.
It is useful for libraries to be located away from a noisy building to enable students to concentrate.
It is useful for libraries to be located away from noisy buildings to enable students to concentrates.
It is useful for a library to be located away from noisy buildings to enable a student to concentrate.
questions.correct_answer: It is useful for libraries to be located away from noisy buildings to enable students to concentrate.

questions.question:
Directions: Without changing the meaning of the given statement, choose the most appropriate option in which the statement is expressed in future tense.

If a cyclist saw an empty stretch, he would speed up.



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist D | Section B | Question: 53
options: If a cyclist saw an empty stretch, he will speed up.
If a cyclist sees an empty stretch, he would speed up.
If a cyclist sees an empty stretch, he will speed up.
If a cyclist will see an empty stretch, he will speed up.
questions.correct_answer: If a cyclist sees an empty stretch, he will speed up.

questions.question:

As a rule of thumb, I always shut down my devices rather than leave them in idle mode.

Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist D | Section E | Question: 131

Which of these statements reflects a contrast between two flowers?



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT Scientist B 2020 November: 9
options: This tulip is as colourful as a rose
This tulip does not smell as bad as a daffodil
This tulip turns towards light just like sunflower
This tulip is grown in bunches, like a lotus
questions.correct_answer: This tulip does not smell as bad as a daffodil
